ddls:
CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "rel_date" TEXT /* Release date of the file */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Name of the file or package */,
  "importance" TEXT /* Importance level of the release (recommended, optional) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the release */,
  "revision" TEXT /* Revision number of the release */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the latest version */,
  "dup_status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the file is a duplicate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the release */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the release (e.g., firmware, software) */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* Security level of the release (e.g., high, medium) */,
  "compatibility" TEXT /* Compatibility information of the release */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the release */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the release */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the release was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_compatibility FOREIGN KEY ("compatibility") REFERENCES compatibility ("compatibility_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_security_level FOREIGN KEY ("security_level") REFERENCES security_levels ("security_level_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated release */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "file_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file type */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for the file */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_file_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_type_id") REFERENCES file_types ("file_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated release */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the release */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was released */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Log of changes made in this version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the release */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the release was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "duplicate_files" (
  "dup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each duplicate entry */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release associated with duplicates */,
  "original_file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original file */,
  "duplicate_file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the duplicate file */,
  "resolved_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the duplicate has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_duplicate_files_original_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("original_file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_duplicate_files_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_duplicate_files_duplicate_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("duplicate_file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_types" (
  "file_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file type */,
  "file_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the file type (e.g., zip, exe) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file type */,
  "mime_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the file type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permission_level" INTEGER /* Permission level of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_logs" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change log entry */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_logs" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., release, update) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_levels" (
  "security_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security level */,
  "security_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the security level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the security level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compatibility" (
  "compatibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compatibility */,
  "compatibility_name" TEXT /* Name of the compatibility */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compatibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compatibility_id")
)
